basics.name: Dimple Shukla
basics.label: Lead Flutter Engineer
basics.summary: I engineer mobile apps where performance is a feature, scale is built in, and quality = f(detail). Lead Flutter Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and delivering high-performance, scalable mobile systems, including real-time and data-intensive applications in fintech domains. Proven track record of improving application performance, reducing latency, and owning end-to-end delivery of production-grade systems.

work.name: HDFC Securities
work.summary: Working on HDFC Sky mobile application
highlights: Owned end-to-end development of Mutual Funds module (BSE 2.0) including SIP and lumpsum flows with UPI and NetBanking integrations
Designed and delivered high-performance fintech features handling real-time data and transaction workflows
Built and enhanced investment and trading modules improving user engagement and adoption
Migrated 100+ deeplinks to Appsflyer OneLink ensuring zero downtime
Improved app stability by resolving dependency conflicts and reducing crashes
Elevated engineering documentation practices by creating 25+ technical artifacts including PRDs, solution designs, and workflows

work.name: Marmon Holdings
work.position: Senior Mobile Application Developer / Tech Lead
highlights: Led development of enterprise applications including RailSource and RepairCentral
Boosted application efficiency by 40% and reduced crash rates by 20% through architectural refactoring
Increased delivery speed by 50% by mentoring developers and improving workflows
Owned architecture decisions while contributing as an individual contributor
Established clean architecture and scalable development practices

work.name: Yes Securities
highlights: Developed Omni VSL 2.0 trading application with real-time market data integration
Achieved 99.9% uptime and high reliability
Reduced latency by 25% through middleware and data flow optimization
Built trading modules including order placement, portfolio tracking, and live market feeds
Designed real-time data systems ensuring low-latency user experience

work.name: AimInfologics
highlights: Delivered multiple mobile applications across industries
Led a team of developers handling full SDLC
Built scalable and maintainable applications
Collaborated across product, design, and backend teams
